settings.title: Settings
settings.chatHistoryDesc: Show previous conversations in the sidebar
settings.name: Name
settings.customInstructionsDesc: How would you like MedNexus to respond?
settings.customInstructionsPlaceholder: e.g. Always provide evidence-based references. Use simple language for patient-facing content.
settings.whatToKnow: What should MedNexus know about you?
settings.whatToKnowPlaceholder: e.g. I'm a cardiologist in an outpatient clinic. I prefer metric units and ICD-11 coding.
settings.memoryDesc: MedNexus will remember context from conversations
settings.exportDataDesc: Download a copy of your MedNexus data as JSON
settings.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently delete your account and all data. This cannot be undone.
settings.confirmDeleteChats: This will permanently delete all your chat history. Continue?
settings.confirmDeleteAccount: This will permanently delete your account and all data. This cannot be undone. Continue?
settings.confirmResetPersonalization: Reset all personalization settings to defaults?

sidebar.chatHistoryHidden: Chat history hidden. Enable it in Settings → General.

chat.heroTitle: Chat, upload clinical docs, and get instant medical clarity
chat.heroDesc: Drop PDFs, imaging summaries, or lab results into the conversation. MedNexus performs OCR, simplifies terminology, and cites sources—all in one secure workspace.
chat.dragHint: Drag files or tap to attach · Designed for clinical workflows
chat.welcomeMessage: Hello! I'm MedNexus, your medical AI assistant. Upload a medical document or ask me a question to get started.
chat.newSession: New MedNexus session. Upload a document or start describing the case.
